message:
perf(vector-search): add adaptive fetching and hot partition prefetch

Priority 4 - Adaptive Parallel Fetching:
- Replace fixed PARALLEL_LIMIT=6 with dynamic concurrency (2-12)
- Track batch latencies in rolling window of 10
- Increase concurrency when avg latency < 50ms
- Decrease concurrency when avg latency > 200ms

Priority 5 - Hot Partition Prefetching:
- Add _accessCounts Map to track partition access frequency
- Track accesses in findNearestPartitions
- Add prefetchHotPartitions(topN, minAccesses) method
- Add getAccessStats() for debugging/monitoring

Expected impact:
- +20-50% throughput on fast networks
- Eliminates 1 RTT for frequently accessed partitions
